# Reference filenames for which sbol-rs and libSBOLj3 produce
# different — but both spec-compliant — Turtle output. The cross_impl
# test skips entries in this list. Each entry must be accompanied by a
# `#` comment block above it explaining the rationale and pointing at
# the spec section that permits the divergence.
#
# Format: one bare filename per line, e.g. `component.libSBOLj3.expected.ttl`.
#
# No entries yet — populate as reference outputs are generated and
# divergences are diagnosed.
